name: Winter Squash with Madeira
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Peel, quarter, and seed the squash. Cut into 1/4 inch slices.
3. In a large skillet, sauté the squash in butter and oil until lightly browned (2-3 minutes).
4. Butter a 1-quart baking dish.
5. Arrange half of the squash slices in the dish. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Pour half of the cream and Madeira mixture over the squash.
7. Top with remaining squash slices and season as desired.
8. Pour the remaining cream and Madeira mixture over the top.
9. Sprinkle bread crumbs and chopped walnuts evenly with melted butter on top.
10. Bake for 45 minutes or until the squash is tender.
